transcript.text:
[Chicken and Beer]
[Can't resist]
Do you want the sauce?
[Kids, go away!]
[Refreshing]
There needs to be a movie with chicken & beer
I don't have enough food though, I need more
Hello everyone~
Today, I have fried chicken, some side items, and beer
'Good Fried' sent me these for mukbang
Also have Terra beer
Bon appetit
I'll set these aside for now
Let's start with the original
It's a traditional fried chicken
Can you see it?

The wing and the bong
You guys already know
It's seasoned well
And very crispy
It has a little kick to it too
Tasty
[1 more then!]
The meat is so tender
The drumstick is where it's at
It comes right off
Let's go in order
Spicy
There's really no point in doing this, but for old time's sake
The sauce is very traditional too
You want the sauce? No way, stay!
You can't go wrong with this

The rib meat is tender
To the trash
Liver?
Do you guys eat that?
I don't
hot soy sauce-based
I've never had the spicy soy sauce one
It's just like the soy sauce-based chicken with spice
It's spicy
Beer
[With foam]
[Where did that come from?]
Just a soy sauce flavor
It goes well with spice though
The next one is spicy too It's called Hot Tos
Some potato wedges

Yummy
It's that taste
The shaken fries in front of schools
Brings back memories
I think all of them do
Let's skip the spicy one for now
[Snow Cheese Chicken] Full of powder
Very crispy
I usually try to eat all the meat left on the bones
Leave only the bones
There are a lot of people that throw away the meat
Hot Tos chicken
There are a lot of Cheetos flavored chicken these days
I think it's pretty good
My favorite is the Snow Cheese
Wait no,

Yes
Crispy on the outside, moist on the inside
[Professional De-bone Show]
You know what?
I was going to save them for dessert
But I'm too curious
Honey butter hot dog
Delicious
That's a big sausage
The sausage itself is tasty
[Cheese ball]
The cheese is hardened
But still tasty
[Fish-shaped bun with Cream Puff] It's cute, right? A baby one
It has cream puff inside
Yum

I want to eat more
That's a good ratio
I love eating the skin
But it will only have the meat left
It's getting a little spicy, so it's time for the snow cheese
I don't think I had chicken breast yet
What if I'm left with just chicken breast at the end?
This one is tender too
[Finished in 2 bites]
Long ago when I was younger,
My mom said she likes the neck part
So I thought she really did
And I started to think that she only said that to give us the wings and the drumsticks
But later I found out that she really did like the neck part of the chicken
And it's really tasty
I think I found the neck

Yes it is
I try eating all the meat, but it's difficult to eat everything on the neck
Now for the spicy one since I've cooled down
Spicy!
Jingu is so cute today
He's knocked out
That's a lot of french fries
Right?
This one is very addicting
It's Cheetos-flavored
Hot Cheetos
[Side items too]
I need more beer, I'll brb
I kept it in the refrigerator It's very cold now
Refreshing
The chicken is huge

3 pieces left
[Bottoms up]
I think beer goes well with chicken breast
[It just goes well with chicken]
I thought it was meat, but it's a bone
Skin
They really are good with fried chicken
The original tastes delicious
Really savory
This one's good too
It's been sitting here but you can still hear the crunch
It didn't go stale
Have some chicken for dinner It's so good
It's interesting that I have 1 leg and 1 wing left for all of them
It's good that I had 5 chickens
What is that?

That's huge
How big is the chicken then?
Spicy seasoned
That's soaked in sauce
It's been sitting here, but still tasty
The sauce is completely soaked in
Don't people eat 1 chicken per person?
I wasn't able to do that when I was very young
I was just not good at eating chicken
Snow cheese
That batter
A movie is a must for fried chicken
[Movie/show+fried chicken+beer combo]
1 of this
And 2 of these left
I'll eat that with a movie

They're all spicy
And I need a snack for the movie
It's not enough though I'm going to need more food
Meow
Can you understand?
Meow
Did he understand?
Meow
[Now for a real conversation]
[Please stop]
Don't fall
I will eat the fries with the new order of chicken
That's so much
It's really delicious though
I had 'Good Fried' fried chicken today
Very tasty overall

It had a very traditional taste
Just a standard tasty fried chicken
